title: VehicleDetailRequest
description: Typed AAP request for the `inventory.vehicle` skill. The request MUST identify a specific listing via at least one of `vin`, `stock`, or `vehicle_id`. Carried inside an A2A `Message.parts[].data` DataPart via the `SendMessage` operation.

vin.description: Vehicle Identification Number. Preferred identifier when known.

stock.description: Dealer's stock number, used when VIN is not yet assigned (e.g. in-transit units).

zip.description: Optional buyer ZIP code; when provided, the dealer MAY compute the regional offered_price field.
